title: Hi, sir, something about your movement software.

Sorry sir, I cannot send you message because telegram's 'You Can Only Send Messages to Mutual Contacts' error, so I can only leave a message here...🥲

title: [CampaignDetailAll request failed: no healthy upstream]
author: tomguluson92
body:
Dear @the-laziest-coder 

I am really appreciated for your brilliant and labor-saving automatic tool. Please allow me to ask some questions in details:

- A. after config all the settings in `files` and set `GALXE_CAMPAIGN_IDS` to my task, I have encountered error:
![image](https://github.com/the-laziest-coder/galxe-aio/assets/19585240/5c5c7e9d-3af3-4909-92ae-d177b62b8fdf)

The log in the `errors.txt` is :

``` shell
2024-04-23 16:27:55.811283 | 1) Process account error: Galxe error: CampaignDetailAll request failed: no healthy upstream: Status = 200. Response saved in logs/errors.txt
{"errors":[{"message":"no healthy upstream","path":["campaign"],"extensions":{"code":"Unavailable"}}],"data":{"campaign":null}}
```

- B. I want to make sure that how auth_token is obatained? i.e `twitters.txt` & `discords.txt` 

Thank you very much!
Sam

title: discord error
author: stefan-cir
body:
2024-04-22 20:21:59.727 | WARNING | 1) Failed to complete "Grass Discord Gecko": Failed to link Discord: checkDiscordAccount request failed: Invalid discord token: Status = 200. Response saved in logs/errors.txt


the discord account had the verified role, when i linked it manually everything was perfect and i was able to claim all the tasks (twitter + survey). 
thank you very much for implementing the surveys and twitter accounts so smoothly!

is it possible to fix the discord issue? it seems to be just an issue to bind it to galxe or the api call in general, i logged in with the same token manually.
